info.description: 1:1 coaching session types: Reset Sessions, Founder Reset, Dating Reset, Nervous System Reset

tagline.description: Short one-line hook shown on the /the-work/sessions card grid. e.g. 'For the founder at a sticking point in the business or in herself.'

accent_colour.description: Hex colour used as the accent line on the session card. Match the section: gold for Founder Reset, pink for Dating Reset, blue for Nervous System Reset.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Use the 'Generate SEO' button if available, then edit.
